description: This file contains SCSS mixins related to form validation styling, including state selectors, feedback, tooltips, and input styling for valid and invalid states.

methods.name: form-validation-state-selector
methods.description: Defines CSS rules for form validation states (valid, invalid) to toggle visibility of feedback and tooltip elements.

methods.name: form-validation-state
methods.description: Generates styling for form validation feedback, tooltips, and input borders based on validation state, color, icon, and other parameters.
